Localization.Description: A Silver Ticket attack has been detected, allowing an attacker to obtain a TGS ticket to access a certain service on behalf of any user. Using the received TGS ticket will allow an attacker to increase privileges and completely compromise the node

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A Silver Ticket attack is detected: a forged TGS for accessing host {event_src.host} was issued for the account {object.account.name}
